title: Superset worktree flat generation fixed
summary_text: Completed Superset worktree folder generation fix. Configured Dev project to generate worktrees as /Users/masayuki/.superset/worktrees/Dev/<branch-slug> by setting global worktree_base_dir to /Users/masayuki/.superset/worktrees and Dev project branch_prefix_mode to none with no project-specific worktree_base_dir override. Restarted Superset from Codex, verified terminal-host and host-service are running, verified test worktree /Users/masayuki/.superset/worktrees/Dev/testing-a-message-input on branch testing-a-message-input, and confirmed no live Dev/Dev, cursorvers, or Dev/mo666-med path references remain in app state, terminal meta, DB, or git worktree list.
